PCNDto.DescriptionOfChange: Transfer of Front-End manufacturing and EWS from ST Tours (France) to ST Singapore and Additional Back-End manufacturing plant (subcontractor) for TVS Protection
Standard ST Inner Bulk label is with additional 2D code.
Manufacturing reshaping program.
Die manufacturing process homogenization in ST Tours (France) for TVS (Transient Voltage Suppressor) devices
Line transfer for a full process or process brick (process step, control plan, recipes) from one site to another site
Notification related for 2nd EMEA DC project in Frankfurt
Notification related for 2nd EMEA DC project in Frankfurt
Notification related for 2nd EMEA DC project in Frankfurt
Production transfer of the standard SMD backend line on SMA, SMB & SMC packages from its Bouskoura internal plant (Morocco) to backend partners
EARLY NOTIFICATION - PRODUCTION TRANSFER OF STANDARD SMA/SMB/SMC BACK-END LINE FROM ST BOUSKOURA PLANT (MOROCCO) TO SUBCONTRACTOR PLANT
Production transfer of the standard SMD backend line on SMA, SMB & SMC packages from its Bouskoura internal plant (Morocco) to backend partners
Production transfer of the standard SMD backend line on SMA, SMB & SMC packages from its Bouskoura internal plant (Morocco) to backend partners
Additional equipment of same brand and model on same manufacturing site (capacity increase)

Logistic PCI related to Inner Customized Label (ICL) change for PACKING and not related to Product, The Inner customized labels (ICL) which are pasted on the inner boxes will be using a label size of 90mm x 60 mm (horizontal printing).
Additional Assembly and Test Location in China for Protection devices housed in

In order to better meet the market demand, we have decided to expand our manufacturing capacities for all our Protection devices housed in SMA / SMB package with one additional assembly and test line in a new China subcontractor.
Additional Assembly and Test Location in China for Protection devices housed in

ST is converting its Protection Devices in SMA/B/C and STmite packages to the ECOPACK(r)2 grade, implement at the same time a die design optimization for our Transil products housed in SMA and SMB packages with voltage inferior to 100V.
Change printings on ST outer cartons, ST logo is removed from the printings to align ST outer cartons to common outer packaging practices.

The manufacturing lines for products housed in SMA, SMB and SMC packages, currently located in Ain Sebaa, are being moved to the Bouskoura site, also situated in the neighbourhood of Casablanca, Morocco.
